description_long: This is a rustic, wooden handcart with a rectangular cargo area constructed from weathered wooden planks. The cart features two large, spoked wooden wheels mounted on either side, providing stability and mobility. The sides of the cart are enclosed with vertical wooden slats, forming barriers to prevent items from falling out. Two long, straight wooden handles extend from the front, designed for manual pulling or pushing. Metal reinforcements are visible on the wheels and possibly along the frame, adding durability. The overall appearance suggests a utilitarian design, suitable for transporting goods or materials in an urban or rural setting.
description: A weathered wooden handcart with side rails, two large spoked wheels, and long front handles for manual transport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open end of the cart and the two long handles extending forward.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large spoked wheel, wooden side rails, and the length of the handles.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed back and the full width of the cargo area with side rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the other wheel and the wooden slat construction.
